title: Horses Genetic
description: Get statistics of your horses, breed them, and train them to get the perfect horse!
body:
Horses Genetic allows you to see the statistics of your horses, and to train them. Create your stable with the best horses possible, since horses's statistics are improving from generation to generation. Thanks to this tool, you can breed the best horses together and eventually get exceptional studs! Once you've found your mount, you can train it to make it even better. ## Features - Scan the vehicle's stats - Stats are written on a #paper in main hand (and/or in your action bar/chat -> see options) - Craft **Protein Food** and give it to your mount to begin training (available: bread, cactus, carrot, hay bale) - Train your mount up to level 100, and get significant boosts ## Scan Procedure - right click the horse with a blank paper in mainhand or (slower but more prescise) - Get on the mount - Take 1 blank paper in mainhand - Look at the saddle for a second (= look down -90°) ## Training Procedure Since 2.0 (26.1+), you can train your mounts. - Craft a **Protein Food** (milk + sugar + food) (food: bread, cactus, carrot, hay bale) - Give the **Protein Food** to the mount you want to start training - Train your mount by: giving it more **Protein Food for HP boost**, **riding distances for Speed boost**, and **jumping for Jump boost**. - You can scan the mount and see additionnal bonus stats when trained (see screenshot) ### Additional Tips: - Mounts can XP from level 0 to level 100. - Boosts are permanent, long term investment. - Default max boost at level 100 are: HP +60%, Speed +50%, Jump +30%. - You can train horses, donkeys, mules, camels, pigs, llamas... ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkhg:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
